warnings: name-to-smiles: molecule name 'furan' resolved to SMILES 'o1ccc(fr1)c2ccco2'

prose: The Fukui reactivity indices were calculated using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The input structure was built from the name 'furan', resolved to its SMILES ('o1ccc(fr1)c2ccco2'), and a single-point calculation was performed on this geometry. The computed Fukui index for the most electrophilic atom is approximately 0.65889, corresponding to atom 5 (carbon). The calculation flags warnings that the sum of Fukui indices for both + and - cases suggest possible convergence issues. The method used was DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set, as specified.
